channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The starter you pick in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen means a lot more than you might think — here's why you need to choose carefully
item.description: Playing Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen? You’ll want to pick your starter carefully – but not for the reason you may think.

item.title: How to Make a Killing is a rare misfire for A24 — a serial killer story should not be this boring
item.description: I've reviewed How to Make a Killing, and despite having all the ingredients to be compelling, it's sadly let me down.
